title: Observation and reflection staging stays governed
description: Protects observation staging, reflection candidate-only output, anti-memory exclusion, and visible gap reporting.

expectedBehavior.subject: observation:promotionTarget
expectedBehavior.rationale: Observation staging must not contain Memory Core promotion semantics.

protectedFailureModes.title: observation promotes memory
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: Observation validation must not accept promotionTarget: memory_core.
protectedFailureModes.detection: validateObservationContract returns ok for an observation carrying memory promotion semantics.

expectedBehavior.subject: reflection_output:memory_record_target
expectedBehavior.rationale: Reflection may propose MemoryCandidate rows, but must not target MemoryRecord or SourceDecision final truth.

protectedFailureModes.title: reflection mutates final truth
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: Reflection candidate generation must not be ready when candidateLinks target memory_record.
protectedFailureModes.detection: buildReflectionCandidateGenerationPlan returns ready for memory_record target.

expectedBehavior.subject: observation_prefix:observation-rejected-pattern
expectedBehavior.rationale: Anti-memory must block matching observation prefix items before they become context.

protectedFailureModes.title: rejected observation pattern enters prefix
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: Observation prefix must not include an item targeted by active anti-memory.
protectedFailureModes.detection: selectObservationPrefix includes observation-rejected-pattern instead of anti_memory exclusion.

expectedBehavior.subject: reflection_gap:missing_source_range
expectedBehavior.rationale: Reflection must surface missing evidence as a visible gap instead of silently synthesizing memory.

protectedFailureModes.title: missing evidence gap hidden
protectedFailureModes.mustNot: Reflection issue reports must not omit a gap for a factual observation missing source ranges.
